cross_scene_arcs.title: Divorce Battle with Rex
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Marilyn locks Rex out of the home, discusses divorce strategy with friends and lawyer, and faces courtroom cross-examination with her mother's surprise testimony.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Marilyn controls the marital home and excludes Rex.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Marilyn is on the witness stand, her family background exposed in court.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The outcome of the divorce case remains pending.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Brief Marriage to Howard Doyle
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Marilyn marries Howard D. Doyle, then divorces him, becoming very wealthy.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Marilyn is divorced from Howard and rich.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Evolving Relationship with Miles Massey
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Marilyn turns to Miles in distress, marries him without a prenup, faces fraud accusations, threatens legal action, reconciles by tearing the prenup, and becomes pregnant with his child.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Marilyn is drunk and emotionally distressed, seeking Miles's help.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Marilyn is reconciled with Miles, pregnant, and concerned for his safety.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Miles and Marilyn's Relationship Turbulence
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Miles develops an attraction to Marilyn, which leads to a crisis intervention, engagement, revelation of deception, an aborted murder plot, and final reconciliation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Miles is distracted by personal attraction to Marilyn during divorce negotiations.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Miles and Marilyn reconcile and choose to stay married after overcoming deception and conflict.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Professional Identity and Ethical Compromise
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Miles starts as an aggressive divorce attorney, uses tactical cross-examination, later advocates for love in client relationships, but then crosses ethical lines by arranging a murder-for-hire.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Established senior partner with a destroy-the-opponent approach to divorce cases.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Publicly promotes love but privately engages in criminal conspiracy, creating a disconnect between words and actions.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The contradiction between his stated philosophy and his criminal actions remains unresolved, with potential professional and personal consequences.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Deception and Revenge Plot Resolution
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Miles is drawn into Marilyn's marriage to Howard, suspects foul play, learns of a revenge plot against him, and reacts by arranging then aborting a hit on Marilyn after circumstances change.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Miles is stunned by Marilyn's engagement to Howard and tasked with drafting the pre-nuptial agreement.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Miles aborts the murder plot after learning of Rex's death and Marilyn's inheritance, shifting towards personal reconciliation.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Marital Conflict Intensifies
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Rex's divorce conflict with Marylin escalates from initial lockout and threats to courtroom tensions and explicit threats of violence.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Locked out of home and threatened by Marylin with dogs.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Under threat of violent retaliation from Marylin after courtroom setback.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Imminent harm or confrontation from Marylin.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Pursuit of Favorable Divorce Outcome
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Rex seeks to minimize financial loss in divorce by securing legal representation, negotiating terms, and proceeding through court, despite setbacks.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Aiming to discuss divorce to prevent financial ruin.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: In court proceedings with Marilyn's grievances recorded and behavior corrected.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How asset division will be resolved given marital fault and no prenup.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Health and Emotional Decline
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Rex's physical health worsens during divorce negotiations, culminating in acute pain at a party.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Experiencing health issues and emotional distress in negotiation.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Suffering acute arm pain with concern from performers.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Severity and implications of Rex's health problems.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Attorney-Client Dynamics with Miles Massey
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Miles Massey takes control of Rex's divorce case, guiding negotiations and disciplining Rex in court, establishing a dominant professional relationship.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Retained by Miles Massey after disclosing compromising details.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Corrected by Miles in court for inappropriate behavior.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Effectiveness of Miles's strategy in protecting Rex's interests.
